name: Sorcerer's Maze
short_description: Use magic powers and secret weapons to accomplish your mission. You have magic spells to use throughout the game to help conquer the baddest bosses. Sorcerer's Maze brings back some of the most exciting arcade type puzzle elements and combines them in one with a whole new twist!
detailed_description: Travel through 101 stages in 10 different worlds in search of the Sorcerer. Use magic powers and secret weapons to accomplish your mission. You have magic spells to use throughout the game to help conquer the baddest bosses. Sorcerer's Maze brings back some of the most exciting arcade type puzzle elements and combines them in one with a whole new twist!
about_the_game: Travel through 101 stages in 10 different worlds in search of the Sorcerer. Use magic powers and secret weapons to accomplish your mission. You have magic spells to use throughout the game to help conquer the baddest bosses. Sorcerer's Maze brings back some of the most exciting arcade type puzzle elements and combines them in one with a whole new twist!
